div.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; padding: 15px 16px; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 12px;
text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;

h1.t-attf-style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 2px; color: {{primary_color}}; text-transform: uppercase;

div.style: display: inline-block; text-align: left; font-size: 11px; color: #666;
margin-bottom: 15px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -8px;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Full Name

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Date of Birth

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Phone

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Email

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Branch

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
margin-bottom: 15px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -8px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Last Test Date

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Next Follow-up

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Active Rx

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Rx Valid Until

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
margin-bottom: 15px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -8px; margin-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px dashed #e0e0e0; padding-bottom: 10px;
flex: 0 0 33.33%; max-width: 33.33%; padding: 0 8px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Company

div.style: font-size: 14px; color: #333;
flex: 0 0 33.33%; max-width: 33.33%; padding: 0 8px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Policy Number

div.style: font-size: 14px; color: #333;
flex: 0 0 33.33%; max-width: 33.33%; padding: 0 8px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.label: Expiry

div.style: font-size: 14px; color: #333;
margin-bottom: 20px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px;

div.style: border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #555; white-space: pre-wrap; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 60px; line-height: 1.6;
font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; padding: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; min-height: 100vh; background-color: #fff;
width: 350px; height: 550px; background-color: #f4f4f4; border-radius: 15px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); display: flex; position: relative;
flex: 1; padding: 30px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: relative;
position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); opacity: 0.03; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0;
display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; z-index: 1;

div.t-attf-style: width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 2px solid {{secondary_color}}; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 10px;

div.style: z-index: 1;
margin-bottom: 20px;
font-size: 14px; color: #000; margin-bottom: 5px;
font-size: 16px; color: #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; padding-bottom: 5px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
font-size: 14px; color: #000; margin-bottom: 5px;
font-size: 16px; color: #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; padding-bottom: 5px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
font-size: 14px; color: #000; margin-bottom: 5px;
font-size: 16px; color: #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; padding-bottom: 5px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
font-size: 14px; color: #000; margin-bottom: 5px;
font-size: 16px; color: #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; padding-bottom: 5px;
margin-top: auto; align-self: flex-end; text-align: center; z-index: 1;
font-size: 10px; color: #333; margin-top: 5px;
